name: Mochi Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the mochiko, sugar, and baking powder.
2. Add the melted butter, milk, beaten eggs, lemon extract, vanilla extract, and shredded coconut. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Pour the batter into a 9 x 13 inch pan.
4. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F (175°C).
5. Allow to cool completely before serving.
